description: CompositionBlack top made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra-elastane, has a round neck, short raglan sleeves, pink and grey rubber print with shimmer, brand logo in rubber print on the left hem, and tag with brand name and shimmer on the right hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separately at less than 40 degreesDo not tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on print/ trims/ logoUpdate your look with ease by slipping into this chic black tee made of a cotton-lycra-elastane blend. The top with a stylish rubber print enhances your girlish charm, while the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair this with jeans and sneakers for a fun filled day at the mall. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
